products.name: Cell Reliability Test - 17010
products.descriptor: High-precision battery cell charge/discharge reliability test system for LIB, EDLC, and LIC cells

evidence.snippet:
### Battery Reliability Test System
#### Chroma 17010
#### Up to ±0.015% of full scale
#### Up to 100µS
#### Up to 10mS
Chroma’s Battery & Reliability Test System is a high-precision system designed specifically for testing lithium-ion battery (LIB) cells, electric double-layer capacitors (EDLCs), and lithium-ion capacitors (LICs).
[explore](https://www.chromausa.com/product/battery-reliability-test-system-model-17010/)

products.name: Cell Reliability Test - 17010H
products.descriptor: High-precision high-current battery cell reliability test system with potentiostatic control

evidence.snippet:
[![Chroma 17010H Battery Reliability Test System](https://www.chromausa.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/06/17010H-04.png)](https://www.chromausa.com/product/battery-reliability-test-system-17010h/)
### Battery Reliability Test System
#### Chroma 17010H
#### ±0.015% of F.S.
#### ±0.005% of F.S.
#### 300A/150A/30A
High-precision charge and discharge test equipment specifically designed for high current/high power performance testing
[explore](https://www.chromausa.com/product/battery-reliability-test-system-17010h/)

products.name: Scalable Battery Module/Pack Test System - 17050
products.descriptor: High-power scalable battery module/pack cycler covering 33V–2000V at up to 1.08MW per channel

evidence.snippet:
### Scalable Battery Module/Pack Test System
#### Chroma 17050
#### 1-4 Channels Each 6kW-1.08MW
#### BatteryPro X,
#### Auto-ranging power stages with available models covering from 33V to 2000V at full power
High-power, flexible test system designed to evaluate the performance, safety, and lifecycle of battery modules and packs under real-world conditions
[explore](https://www.chromausa.com/product/scalable-battery-module-pack-test-system-17050/)

products.name: Regenerative Battery Pack Test System - 17020
products.descriptor: Regenerative battery module/pack cycler with accurate charge/discharge for repetitive reliable testing

evidence.snippet:
### Regenerative Battery Pack Test System
#### Chroma 17020
#### 20V/ 60V/ 100V/ 200V/ 500V
#### 65A/ 13A/ 62.5A/ 50A/ 30A
#### 1.25kW/ 600W/ 2.5kW

[explore](https://www.chromausa.com/product/17020-regenerative-battery-pack-test/)

products.name: High Power Regenerative Pack Test System - 17040
products.descriptor: High-power regenerative battery pack test system 60kW–300kW with energy recovery to grid

evidence.snippet:
### Regenerative Battery Pack Test System
#### Chroma 17040
#### 60kW/ 120kW/ 180kW/ 250kW/ 300kW
#### 60~1000V
#### ±0.1%FS
With an Energy Regenerative Function to reduce power consumption during discharge, ensuring a stable power grid without generating harmonic pollution on other devices.
[explore](https://www.chromausa.com/product/regenerative-battery-pack-test-17040/)

unresolved_questions: Battery HIL Testbed 8610, BMS HIL Testbed 8630, Scalable Battery Module/Pack Test System 17050, and 16CH Battery Cell Simulator 87001 were cited from navigation links only — dedicated product pages were skipped due to budget (skipped_budget). Readiness is set to 'production' based on their catalog listing status but detailed specs were not confirmed.
Regenerative Battery Pack Test System 17020 was cited from a 'related products' section on the Battery Pro page rather than its own dedicated product page.
